ConnectionStrings.//PegboardDb: PostgreSQL connection. Supplied per-environment on the VPS via the ConnectionStrings__PegboardDb environment variable (kept out of source control). Left blank here on purpose.

Smtp.//Username: On the VPS the EPEGBOARD_SMTP_USERNAME machine env var is used; this is the local/default fallback.
Smtp.//Password: On the VPS the EPEGBOARD_SMTP_PASSWORD machine env var supplies this (kept out of source control). Left blank here on purpose - rotate at IONOS, never commit.

Tracking.//ScreenshotImage: Image served by the /media/{trackerId}.png open-beacon (from wwwroot/Images/<file>). site-hero.png is the epegboard.com homepage hero composite - the live session dashboard (core product) + the phone (mobile) + the 'League team insights' overlay - so outreach shows the product in action, not just the picker. Captured from the homepage by PegboardWeb's HeroScreenshotCapture E2E test.
